description: Aviation content and data compliance rules — gates what content workers can generate and what data can appear in outputs. Loaded before any content generation in the aviation vertical.

hard_stops.logic: ZERO safety-critical operational data in any social or marketing output. Content generation fails if METAR, NOTAM, TFR, or winds aloft data detected in social output.
hard_stops.message: Operational data (weather, NOTAMs, TFRs) cannot appear in marketing or social content.

hard_stops.logic: ZERO specific flight details in any marketing content. Tail numbers, routes, crew names cannot appear in social posts.
hard_stops.message: Specific flight details (tail numbers, routes, crew names) cannot appear in marketing content.

soft_guides.logic: Brand and operational content only for marketing. Alex generates content about the operator brand, not specific operations.
soft_guides.guidance: Marketing content should focus on the operator's brand, capabilities, and service areas — never specific operational details.

automated_actions.logic: Audit trail entry on every preflight output. Every CoPilot/EFB/FRAT output writes to the audit trail.
Explicit data gap flags in safety-critical outputs. If any data source is unavailable, output must flag the gap explicitly.
automated_actions.message_template: DATA GAP: {{serviceName}} data is currently unavailable. This output does not include {{dataType}}.
